form.formComment: Racing second-up. First race start finished fifth of 13 runners at Uttoxeter on December 31 2024 over 3200m, 6 len behind A Path To Ronda carrying 72kg at $23. Returned from break finished eighth of 14 starters at Hereford on March 7 over 3200m, 23 len behind Seven Stars carrying 71kg at $9. Might be out of her depth.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 40 days. Last run finished fourth of 13 runners at Wincanton on March 5 over 3000m, 17 len behind Indannya carrying 70kg at $11. The start before that; finished third of 14 starters at Taunton on January 17 over 3300m, 9 len behind Heron In The Park carrying 71.5kg at $9.50. Could prove harder to beat this time.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after seven months finished fourth of 8 runners at Newcastle on March 31 over 4100m, 13 len behind I C U In My Dreams carrying 70kg at $51. Previously second-up finished ninth of 12 starters at Newcastle All Weather on February 27 2025 over 2500m, 6 len behind Rubellite carrying 56kg at $126. Meets a tough field and prefer others this time.

previousStarts.winnerOrSecond: I C U IN MY DREAMS

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming held ground to the line finished second of 8 runners at Ludlow on February 18 over 3200m, on slow going 0.5 len behind Sir Hobnob carrying 71.5kg at $1.90. Second-up pulled up at Kelso on March 21 over 3200m. Fitter now and making headway every start. Forgive that run and should be right in the mix.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished fourth of 8 runners at Catterick on March 4 over 3100m, 21 len behind Riviera Walk carrying 71.5kg at $5.50. Second-up finished fourth in a small field at Huntingdon on March 18 over 3900m, 56 len behind Kittys Glance carrying 72kg at $5.50. Continues to improve. Rates well and can feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up pulled up at Kempton Park on February 2 over 3200m. Second run from a spell finished fifth of 12 starters at Ludlow on March 19 over 3200m, 15 len behind Borna Gem with 72kg at $13. Has been racing well. Has to be included again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a about 18 months break. Finished off last preparation 10 of 11 starters at Carlisle November 11 2024 over 3430m, 22 len behind Getawhisky carrying 71kg at $151. First up last campaign 5 of 12 starters at Sedgefield October 9 2024 over 3400m, 11 len behind Riviera Walk carrying 69kg at $41. This looks tough and others preferred.
